meaning: n.连本带利的赌博vt.连本带利地赌博,使增值
examples: She hopes to parlay her success as a model into an acting career.
Don't know how to parlay an internship into a full-time position?
Before we get into the details, we need to understand more about Parlay.
The essence of the Saban money touch is an uncanny ability to parlay small properties into big ones.
We parlay our preferences into spending habits and seek to score as producers by earning profits.
